title: Segment Any 3D-Part in a Scene from a Sentence
abstract: Existing datasets and methods for 3D scene understanding are predominantly limited to object-level comprehension, primarily due to the costly and labor-intensive process of annotating 3D parts. To address this, we introduce 3D-PU, the first large-scale 3D dataset with dense part annotations, constructed via an innovative and cost-effective method for building synthetic 3D scenes. We further propose OpenPart3D, a 3D-input-only framework designed to effectively tackle the challenges of part-level segmentation in 3D scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves strong generalization capabilities across various 3D scene datasets for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding at the part level.
note: arXiv preprint submitted 2025-06-24. Target venue IJCAI 2026.
